name: 1N4148W (SOD-123)
designNotes: Standard keyboard matrix diode -- one per key switch
SOD-123 is larger and easier to hand-solder than SOD-323
Cathode (band) side orientation must be consistent across the entire matrix
Place as close to switch pad as possible to minimize trace length
summary: Standard keyboard matrix diode in SOD-123 package — easy to hand-solder
features: Industry standard switching diode for keyboard matrices
100V reverse voltage — massive margin for keyboard use
150mA forward current — sufficient for key switch scanning
concerns: Larger than SOD-323 alternative — takes more board space
Cathode orientation must be consistent across entire matrix
Ensure proper diode direction in schematic matches PCB layout
